starknet.technical_specs: STARK-based Validity Rollup using Cairo. 10k+ TPS target. Uses Ethereum EIP-4844 blobs for DA (not external modular DA for mainnet).

milestones.impact: Memory expansion cost optimization and EIP-7823 alignment

monad.technical_specs: 10k TPS, 0.4s block time, single-slot finality (~0.8s). Parallel execution, MonadBFT, MonadDB.

eigenlayer.focus: Vertical AVS specialization (EigenAI, EigenCompute). Multichain Verification for L2 security inheritance.

celestia.starknet_integration: Blobstream for Starknet (Cairo-port of Blobstream X). ONLY for Layer 3 (L3) appchains. Not used by Starknet mainnet L2.

redstone.starknet_integration: Pull-based oracle model using @redstone-finance/starknet-connector. Data verified on-chain only when needed.

bitgert.tech: PoSA consensus. 100k TPS claim. Bridge V2 for cross-chain. Paybrise payment gateway Focal point 2026: Decentralized Marketplace.
